zebra-yz-boost-350-v2:
The one everyone pictures when you say 350. White-and-black marled Primeknit, the red SPLY-350 stripe across the side, and a translucent boost sole that still turns heads. Our 1:1 build matches the weave, the stripe placement and the cage — we're upfront that it's a rep, and we'd rather you compare it in person.

Fits true to size; most people take their normal US. Wears with everything, which is exactly why it never sits in the box.
beluga-2-0-yz-boost-350-v2:
The blueprint a lot of 350s are still chasing. Cool grey Primeknit with the bold orange SPLY stripe and a clean boost midsole — loud in the right way without trying. Built 1:1 from the upper texture down to the stripe tone.

True to size for most feet; go up a half if you run wide. A safe first pair if you want a 350 that reads instantly.
bone-yz-boost-350-v2:
The 350 you reach for without thinking. A soft off-white, tonal knit with no loud branding — just clean lines and a matching sole. It's the neutral that quietly works with every fit in your rotation.

True to size. Easy to keep crisp with a quick dry-brush — see the care guide before the first wear.
cream-yz-boost-350-v2:
Triple-white done right: all-cream Primeknit on a matching sole, the cleanest the silhouette gets. Summer staple, photographs beautifully, goes with denim or a sweat set without a second thought.

True to size. White knit shows everything, so store it out of direct sun and brush it often — it stays gallery-clean with five minutes of upkeep.
black-red-yz-boost-350-v2:
Bred energy. Deep black Primeknit with the red SPLY-350 hit and a black boost sole — the stealth 350 that still has a pulse. One of the most wearable colorways we stock.

True to size for most. Hides scuffs better than the whites, so it's the low-maintenance pick of the lineup.
static-reflective-yz-boost-350-v2:
Grey static knit by day, full light-up by night — the reflective threads catch a flash and the whole upper glows. The 350 with a party trick, and our 1:1 nails the reflectivity people actually buy these for.

True to size. Tap the QC photos if you want to see the flash before you commit.
clay-yz-boost-350-v2:
Warm grey Primeknit with a muted clay-red SPLY stripe — earthy, understated, and a little different from the usual rotation. Pairs especially well with washed denim and earth tones.

True to size for most feet; size up a half if you run wide.
natural-yz-boost-350-v2:
Oatmeal monochrome — a soft, sandy tonal knit with zero loud branding. Quietly one of the best neutrals in the 350 range and an easy everyday wear.

True to size. Light upper, so a quick brush keeps it looking new.
onyx-yz-foam-rnnr:
All-black Foam Runner — the comfiest thing in the lineup and the easiest to wear. One-piece molded foam, the signature cutouts, and a footbed that disappears once it's broken in.

Foam Runners run big: if you're a half size, size down to the whole. Wide feet love them; narrow feet should size down.
onyx-yz-slide:
The everyday black slide — thick, sculpted foam with a grippy footbed that's better on tile and poolside than it has any right to be. The off-duty staple you'll wear more than you expect.

They run big: half sizes, size down to the nearest whole.
stone-sage-yz-foam-rnnr:
A muted green-grey Foam Runner — soft, earthy, and a step off the usual neutrals. Same one-piece foam comfort, a color that works with more than you'd think.

Runs big: half size? Size down to the whole. Wide feet, true to size.
desert-sand-yz-slide:
Warm sand-tan slide in thick, contoured foam — the summer-to-couch one-piece that goes with shorts, sweats, or nothing in particular. Easy on, easy to live in.

They run big: size down to the nearest whole.
trfrm-yz-boost-350-v2:
Cool grey Primeknit with a translucent orange-flecked stripe and a matching orange-infused midsole — a sharper, more transformed take on the 350 shape. Urban edge without shouting for attention.

Our 1:1 build matches the stripe texture and midsole tone; we're upfront that it's a rep, so compare the QC photos before you commit. True to size for most feet.
